ownership.name: Jim Irsay
ownership.style: Passionate, hands-on owner; publicly vocal about team direction; willing to make bold roster moves
ownership.tendencies: Patient with Ballard despite declining results; values stability but demands playoffs; has been known to meddle

gm.name: Chris Ballard
gm.philosophy: Build through the draft; historically conservative in free agency; values defensive players and offensive linemen; BPA approach
gm.analytics_approach: Traditional scouting with some analytics; less aggressive than peer GMs

head_coach.name: Shane Steichen
head_coach.scheme_offense: Spread concepts; RPOs; developed Jalen Hurts in Philly; building around Anthony Richardson (or successor)
head_coach.scheme_defense: 4-3 base; zone coverage concepts; defense gave up 24.2 PPG and 2nd-most passing YPG (247.9)

decision_makers.primary: Chris Ballard (GM) — plans to acquire more picks via trade

roster_2026.qb_situation: Anthony Richardson or successor — QB situation unsettled
key_departures: DJ Moore (WR, traded to Bears for 2nd-round pick)
Michael Pittman Jr. (WR, traded to Steelers)
Sauce Gardner (CB, acquired from Jets — major trade piece)
Adonai Mitchell (WR, traded to Jets in Gardner deal)
key_signings: Sauce Gardner (CB, acquired from Jets for 2026+2027 1st-round picks + Adonai Mitchell)

traded_away: Round 1 Pick 16 (to Jets in Sauce Gardner trade)

needs.reason: Defense severely underperformed; 24.2 PPG allowed; need impact pass rusher to improve unit
Zaire Franklin regressing at 29; Germaine Pratt headed to free agency; middle of defense easily exposed
Interior offensive line depth needs attention; must protect QB investment; Ballard traditionally values trenches
